metadata.description: Rust-style discipline for TypeScript. Claude Code plugin with PreToolUse Write/Edit hooks plus a bundled ESLint plugin for cross-file rules.

plugins.name: perfect-typescripter
plugins.description: Bans null/undefined/optionals/booleans-as-state/any/unknown/positional-args/string-widening/phantom-type-params/degenerate-comparators in TypeScript. Forces discriminated unions and exhaustive switches everywhere domain state lives.
